title: Verify key analytics events are triggered with accurate attributes
description: Tests that critical tracking events are fired correctly during the Trial Corner flow to ensure accurate success metric measurement.
preconditions: A tool to monitor analytics events is available.
User is in the target cohort.

steps.description: 2. Arrive at the Trial Corner. (Monitor for 'trial-corner-viewed').
4. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder'.

expected_result: Each action triggers the corresponding event. The final step fires 'remind-me-clicked' with 'page_source: cancel_pop-up'.
